title: Creamy Caramelized Norwegian Peach Pudding
description: A comforting and creamy dessert featuring caramelized peaches and a hint of floral flavor, perfect for a sweet treat or hangover cure. This dairy-free-friendly pudding is a unique twist on traditional Norwegian desserts.

ingredients.name: edible flowers
ingredients.notes: such as violas or pansies, for garnish

instructions: In a medium saucepan, combine the peach juice, maple syrup, and salt. Bring to a boil over medium heat, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
In a separate saucepan, caramelize the sliced peaches over medium heat for 5-7 minutes, or until golden brown.
In a large bowl, whisk together the coconut cream, vanilla extract, and almond milk.
Add the cornstarch to the bowl and whisk until smooth.
Gradually pour the warm peach juice mixture into the bowl, whisking constantly.
Add the caramelized peaches to the bowl and stir to combine.
Pour the mixture into individual serving cups or a large serving dish.
Refrigerate for at least 2 hours, or until chilled and set.
Garnish with edible flowers and serve chilled.
